home.headline: The app your business needs.
home.subline: Pick a product type and watch it come to life — each one built end to end, across mobile, web, and backend.
home.detailHint: Tap the features you'd want — we'll build exactly that.
home.mailIntro: Hi, I'd like a {app} app with these features:
home.sentBody: Thanks — we'll get back to you soon.
home.sendError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
home.moreText: Either your idea is covered above, or it's something unique — share it and we'll help bring it to life.

hero.headline: We build apps end to end.
hero.subline: iOS, Android, web, and backend — built once, properly, with the production patterns we use on real client work.

showcases.title: Showcases
showcases.subtitle: Production patterns we ship — explore the source.

food.label: Food delivery
food.tagline: Everything your customers need to order, track, and reorder with ease.

liveTracking.benefit: Customers watch their driver arrive in real time

favourites.label: Favourites & reorder
favourites.benefit: One-tap reordering brings customers back faster

payments.benefit: Cards, wallets, and cash all supported securely

scheduled.benefit: Let customers pick their ideal delivery time

menuFilters.benefit: Find dishes by diet, allergens, or price

ratings.label: Ratings & reviews
ratings.benefit: Build trust with honest customer feedback

promos.benefit: Reward regulars and boost repeat orders

multiLanguage.benefit: Reach every customer in their own language

supportChat.benefit: Resolve order issues without leaving the app
